metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Wolfram Institute

plugins.name: computational-research
plugins.description: AI-assisted computational research with wiki knowledge base, LaTeX/Typst paper scaffolding and notes, Wolfram paclet development and publishing, notebook generation, guided tours, Wolfram ecosystem search, pure-math project scaffolding with MathWorld/nLab/OEIS/DLMF/Wikipedia search, BibTeX from arXiv/DOI, Lean/Mathlib formalization bridge, multi-session work tracking (spec/tasks/progress), Conventional-Commits enforcement via scaffolded git hooks, optional prompt-provenance tracking for generated artifacts, and revision workflow.
